title: Ha Giang
best_time: September through to November is a good time to visit this remote province, with cooler temperatures. In November, Ha Giang is hugely popular during the Buckwheat Flower Festival. April to June is pleasant and warm, July and August can be very hot with regular monsoons.
description: A border province and official Frontier Area, Ha Giang lies in the remote far northern region of the country. To visit this province is to journey back in time and encounter some of Vietnam’s most rugged and grand landscapes. Ha Giang is best experienced as a road trip on two wheels, soaking up the majesty of the landscape and the atmosphere of the remote towns and minority villages.
tips: Thích hợp đi theo dạng road trip, cần kiểm tra thời tiết và chuẩn bị kỹ nếu di chuyển bằng xe máy.

related_links.title: The Ha Giang loop: a four-day road trip

title: Ma Pi Leng Pass
best_time: Nên đi ban ngày, thời tiết khô ráo để ngắm cảnh và di chuyển an toàn.
description: The roads of Ha Giang serve up the ultimate motorcycle adventures. The drive into Dong Van is impossibly beautiful, however Ma Pi Leng — where the road snakes past the Nho Que River — is the jewel in Ha Giang crown.
tips: Nên đi chậm, giữ an toàn khi di chuyển bằng xe máy hoặc ô tô qua đèo.

related_links.title: The Ha Giang loop: a four-day road trip

title: Quan Ba Pass and Dong Van Karst Plateau Geopark
best_time: September through to November is a good time to visit this remote province, with cooler temperatures. In November, Ha Giang is hugely popular during the Buckwheat Flower Festival. April to June is pleasant and warm, July and August can be very hot with regular monsoons.
description: Trekking opportunities are plentiful in Ha Giang. The Quan Ba Pass holds a lookout that lives up to its name: Heaven’s Gate. Quan Ba is also the gateway to the lofty limestone peaks and rock-strewn fields of Dong Van Karst Plateau Geopark.
tips: Phù hợp với người thích trekking và khám phá cảnh quan núi đá.

related_links.title: The Ha Giang loop: a four-day road trip

title: Sa Phin H'Mong Palace
address: Sà Phìn, Hà Giang, Việt Nam
best_time: Có thể tham quan trong ngày, nên kết hợp với lịch trình Đồng Văn.
description: Near the border with China stands a H'Mong King Palace in the village of Sa Phin. Built in 1902 during the French occupation, the wood-framed palace is done in the traditional Chinese style and oozes character.
tips: Nên dành thời gian tìm hiểu bối cảnh lịch sử và kiến trúc của dinh thự.

related_links.title: The Ha Giang loop: a four-day road trip

title: Lung Cu Flag Tower
address: Lũng Cú, Hà Giang, Việt Nam
best_time: Chiều muộn là thời điểm dễ chịu hơn để leo bậc thang.
description: Make time to journey north to Lung Cu, where a gigantic Vietnamese flag blows proudly at the border. The best time to arrive is late afternoon as the heat subsides, making the climb of 200 steps a little kinder.
tips: Trang gốc gợi ý nên đến vào cuối buổi chiều vì thời tiết bớt nóng, việc leo khoảng 200 bậc sẽ nhẹ hơn.

related_links.title: The Ha Giang loop: a four-day road trip
